payload.primary_message: Deel offers transparent, flexible, and scalable pricing for hiring contractors, employees, and managing global payroll without hidden costs.
Build and run custom HR workflow automations in minutes without coding to save hours on onboarding, offboarding, and compliance tasks.
Deel HR enables companies to manage global HR operations end-to-end across 150+ countries from a single, unified system.
Petvisor consolidated five fragmented payroll systems into a single centralized Deel platform, enabling one person to manage all global payrolls with improved efficiency and compliance.

Deel operates its own global payroll infrastructure and in-house support across 150+ countries, providing better service quality, compliance, and cost savings compared to competitors using external partners.
Deel provides a unified platform to hire, manage, and pay employees globally while handling compliance automatically, enabling startups to scale without operational overhead.
A unified HR platform consolidates global compliance, payroll, workflows, and integrations into one tool that simplifies people management across 150+ countries.
Automatically manage user access and permissions across your identity provider and applications as employees join, change roles, or leave the organization.
Deel enables compliant global hiring and payroll management across multiple countries with operational efficiency and simplified compliance.

payload.primary_message: Deel enables effortless management of remote and international teams across 150+ countries with significant scale and customer trust.
Deel offers flexible US payroll management that allows teams to manage it themselves, have Deel manage it, or use PEO services, all from one platform with the ability to scale globally.
Deel enables global hiring without proportional cost increases as a company scales.
Deel provides unified global coverage for international and US-based employees across 150+ countries with integrated HR, payroll, and compliance tools, unlike Gusto which requires external tools.
Deel consolidates fragmented global payroll, hiring, and workforce management into a single integrated platform owned and controlled by your enterprise.
White label Deel's global payroll and HR infrastructure to seamlessly integrate into your portfolio and scale your business globally.
Use AI-powered structured career paths and development plans to scale consistent employee growth while saving HR administrative time.
Deel's Talent platform enables rapid, transparent global hiring that dramatically accelerates recruiter placements through instant visibility and structured matching.
Deel offers superior global hiring, payroll, and compliance capabilities across 150+ countries with broader coverage and in-house expertise compared to Rippling.
A single unified platform consolidates global payroll, hiring, and compliance to eliminate vendor sprawl and provide complete visibility across distributed teams.

payload.primary_message: A unified HRIS platform that keeps all worker records in one place and automates daily HR workflows across multiple countries and worker types as your global team grows.
Deel's performance management platform unifies team performance management, reviews, and development in a single integrated system.
Deel enables Cocoroco.com to scale its global talent marketplace efficiently with compliance-assured, fast hiring infrastructure and white-label solutions.
Deel offers a comprehensive all-in-one global HR and payroll platform with superior coverage, compliance, and integrated HR functionality compared to Multiplier.
Deel AI provides instant, 24/7 legal and HR answers integrated with your people data for faster decision-making.
Manage all visa, immigration, and work permit cases for global employee mobility in a single unified platform with expert support across 75+ countries.
Deel enables rapid global hiring by eliminating HR administrative burden, cutting payroll management time by 95% and reducing personnel costs by 40% through access to international talent pools.
Deel is a unified global HR and payroll platform that consolidates all tools needed to manage international teams at scale, with 150+ entities, 120+ integrations, and built-in compliance support.
Deel provides a consolidated platform for payroll, HR, IT, hiring, benefits, and mobility to manage global operations from one system.

payload.primary_message: Compliance rules apply automatically within HR and payroll workflows, flagging risks continuously before mistakes occur.
Deel connects you to vetted brokers and partners to simplify finding, comparing, and setting up benefits packages across 100+ countries without time, expertise, or minimum commitments.
Deel offers an integrated, in-house infrastructure across 150+ countries with unified US and global payroll on a single system, avoiding partner costs and compliance risks compared to ADP.
Build custom HR and payroll workflows with Deel's APIs to automate global onboarding, payroll syncing, and workforce management across your internal systems.
Deel's EOR service enables global hiring and payroll management without establishing separate legal entities, handling compliance and administration across 150+ countries.
A single unified payroll and HR platform eliminates fragmented systems and enables rapid scaling across multiple markets and acquired entities.
Deel offers a comprehensive all-in-one global HR and payroll platform with in-house infrastructure across 150+ countries, superior to Oyster's partner-dependent model.
Deel enables compliant hiring and rapid onboarding of skilled talent in countries where companies lack legal entities.

payload.primary_message: Replace manual spreadsheet-based compensation management with a centralized platform that streamlines compensation reviews, ensures compliance, and enables fair pay decisions across global teams.

Deel provides a comprehensive, compliant, globally-scalable all-in-one platform with owned entities, superior support, and security that outperforms OnTop across hiring, payroll, HR, and compliance functions.
Hire employees globally in just days without setting up local entities or managing compliance, through a unified workflow.
Deel's EOR and immigration services enable companies to hire and scale globally while maintaining compliance in countries where they lack legal presence.
Deel handles complex global entity setup and management so you can focus on scaling your business.
Deel enables remote entrepreneurs to scale global teams across borders with simplified payroll, compliance, and hiring logistics.
Goals in Engage provides built-in goal-setting and tracking across multiple organizational levels to create alignment, clarity, and measurable progress without manual effort.
Deel enables global HR teams to save significant time and effort by automating the entire employee lifecycle, from onboarding and payroll to compliance and PTO management across multiple countries.
AI agents automatically detect issues, explain changes, and help resolve them across HR and payroll workflows without manual setup.

payload.primary_message: Deel offers free exclusive perks and rewards from global and local brands to attract and retain talent without cost to employers.
Deel Mobility enables fast-growing businesses to relocate employees across countries in days with end-to-end immigration support managed through one centralized platform.
Deel's entity setup and EOR services accelerate regulatory approvals and market entry while reducing administrative overhead.
Execute payroll for employees, contractors, and EOR workers across 150+ countries from a single unified platform with automated compliance.
Deel enables globally distributed teams to manage payroll, compliance, and HR processes efficiently through a single unified platform.

Workforce planning software that aligns HR, Finance, and Recruiting through scenario planning, automated approvals, ATS integrations, and AI insights to enable confident, data-driven headcount decisions.
Deel eliminates administrative barriers to hiring globally, enabling companies to build international teams without logistical complexity or compliance risk.
Buy or lease devices globally with integrated logistics and IT management across 130+ countries in one platform, eliminating vendor complexity.
Deel's EOR solution enables companies to access global talent pools and expand across multiple markets without the resource burden of establishing local entities.

Deel enables companies to hire global talent quickly and compliantly, reducing hiring timelines from weeks/months to two days.
HR tasks like time off requests and approvals can be completed directly within Slack and Teams without leaving the platform.
Deel Local Payroll enables rapid scaling of payroll operations by replacing manual, paper-based systems with a cloud-based workflow that handles complex acquisitions seamlessly.

Deel IT consolidates fragmented IT operations—device procurement, management, security, and support—into a single global platform integrated with HR automation.
Deel consolidates fragmented global payroll and HR vendors into one integrated execution layer that connects to your existing HCM/ERP systems.
Deel enables companies to manage global workforces and payroll operations efficiently across multiple countries.
Build custom workforce management solutions by accessing Deel's global payroll and HR data through a unified API.
Deel provides a unified platform enabling startups to hire, manage, and pay workers globally across 150+ countries in minutes while handling compliance automatically.
Automatically control and update employee access to apps and devices as teams change, eliminating manual work and keeping permissions accurate in real time.
Compliance rules apply automatically within payroll and hiring workflows, flagging risks before mistakes occur.

payload.primary_message: Deel launched a native ATS integrated with payroll and onboarding, eliminating the workflow gap that previously cost weeks.
Deel has launched DeelATS, an internal recruiting tool that the company now uses for all hiring, demonstrating confidence in the product.
Deel launched a rebuilt careers page and proprietary ATS platform, demonstrating confidence in its all-in-one hiring and people management solution by using it for its own hiring.
Deel launches an AI-forward careers page with streamlined application and matching tools that reflect candidate demand and enable better global hiring.
Deel's native ATS unifies recruiting and onboarding into a single platform, eliminating tool fragmentation and the need to stitch together separate systems.
Deel now enables companies to pay global employees in stablecoins through a single integrated platform with standard payroll compliance and processing.
Deel AI Analytics enables instant workforce insights through natural language queries on a unified dataset, eliminating the need for manual report building.

Deel's new agentic workflow platform (Akai) automates repetitive manual workflows for global operations teams without requiring developers, APIs, or IT support, delivering significant time and case handling at scale.
The new Deel app is rebuilt from scratch to reduce time workers spend on the platform by optimizing for mobile-specific user needs rather than feature parity with the web product.
Deel launched a native AI-powered ATS that integrates recruiting, headcount planning, and onboarding into one workflow to eliminate manual work and save time.
AI agents are being integrated into ATS workflows to automate repetitive tasks and improve the hiring experience for teams and candidates.
Deel is hiring a Staff Product Designer to shape Design Systems and revamp the mobile app experience for 1.5 million workers globally.
Deel built an AI-first recruitment system that dramatically reduces hiring time by automating candidate screening and surfacing qualified applicants at scale.

Deel's global employment compliance platform is now accessible directly within ChatGPT, providing accurate hiring data for 150+ countries without requiring a separate account or leaving the chat interface.
Deel AI Workforce deploys assignable AI agents that automate high-volume HR, payroll, and operations admin tasks, freeing human teams to focus on strategic work.
Deel's new AI infrastructure (Akai) automates core HR functions including hiring, payroll error detection, and compliance management.
Deel's stablecoin wallet eliminates FX conversion fees and enables faster, more efficient global payouts without requiring users to engage with crypto.
Deel's stablecoin wallet enables contractors in high-inflation markets to hold, earn, and spend earnings in dollars without currency erosion, exchange fees, or multiple intermediary apps.
Deel is accelerating payroll onboarding by replacing manual specialist workflows with AI-driven automation to handle a rapidly scaling entity intake problem.
Deel is hiring a Product Partnership Manager to identify, negotiate, and close strategic tech partnerships across North America and LATAM.
Customer relationships can evolve into deeper partnerships through shared problem-solving and co-creation.
Deel has launched 7 new integrated products to solve the complexity of global hiring, payroll, compliance, and workforce management.

Deel Mobility eliminates manual immigration workflows by providing AI-powered, integrated case management with real-time eligibility checks, HRIS synchronization, and end-to-end tracking across 100+ countries.
Deel's AI agents and new compliance, mobility, and workforce management tools enable global teams to automate routine work, maintain control, and operate more efficiently in 2026.
Deel automated release gates to ship small improvements continuously without approval delays.
AI should not be used for critical payroll calculation and tax filing tasks where errors are costly and irreversible.
Deel's AI Workforce product enables seven assignable AI agents to work alongside HR teams and inside HRIS systems to automate high-volume admin tasks.
Deel's competitive advantage lies in treating global payroll infrastructure as a core technology problem, handling distributed systems, real-time calculations, regulatory change, and AI integration.
Intense product work at Deel requires active recovery through physical activity outside of work to maintain well-being.
Companies need foundational infrastructure—job architecture, defensible compensation bands, and connected HR/payroll data—to meaningfully implement pay transparency, not just compliance checkboxes.
